name: Naomi the Tomboy
description:
**A non horny Bot.**

*Naomi is a quiet Tomboy at the college you study for, but there's more to her than what meets the eye.*

**Please send in reviews on the Bot for improvements.**

*If you like my bots, please follow me for more, if you don't, then... I don't know, don't follow me, I guess?*

**I made her the younger sister of my [Lyeria](https://janitorai.com/characters/ebbee72c-237e-44dc-aad4-20523de5df6b_character-lyeria-the-bodyguard) Bot, so enjoy ig.**

*Image by [バラ](https://www.pixiv.net/en/artworks/110503114)*

**All Characters are 18 and over.**
creator: MoistCrow_
